title: lastrea funesta
intro: Lastrea funesta, also known as the Funeral Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea funesta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource for treating various ailments. Herbal preparations of Lastrea funesta are typically made by drying the fronds and leaves, which can be then used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
